title: Parched And Bogged
description: A set of vanilla-like mobs inspired by the Husk, Parched, Bogged etc.
body:
# Parched And Bogged 
This is a simple that adds the Dune with plans to add more vanilla-like mob variations based on new mojangs new Parched and not-so-new Bogged, Husk and Stray mobs.
## Dune
![Dune](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oh6eyHPj/images/8d9a33a56123aa7429d1d2ff1ba5808374375e52.png)
The Dune is the first mob of the mod. A creeper variant that tries to bury you under piles of sand. What more could you want? But keep them away from the wind charges — they can absorb them and gain the power to move solid blocks!
